# AEO Decoded

> AEO Decoded is a podcast by Gary Crossey that documents, tests, and proves
> how websites earn citations from AI answer engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity,
> and Gemini. Seasons 1-2 cover AEO fundamentals; Season 3 is a public build
> log with measured results.

## Key pages
- [Episodes](https://aeodecoded.ai/episodes/): full archive, Seasons 1-2
- [The Reset](https://aeodecoded.ai/the-reset/): why Season 3 restarted
- [Irishguy Design Studio](https://www.irishguydesign.studio/): the studio that builds this method for clients
